page_metadata.biotools__summary: Package that offers an environment for estimating the mutagenetic trees mixture models from cross-sectional data and using them for various predictions. It includes functions for fitting the trees mixture models, likelihood computations, model comparisons, waiting time estimations, stability analysis, etc.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Package that offers an environment for estimating the mutagenetic trees mixture models from cross-sectional data and using them for various predictions. It includes functions for fitting the trees mixture models, likelihood computations, model comparisons, waiting time estimations, stability analysis, etc.
